texto: The reality is that you will grieve forever. You will not ‘get over’ the loss of a loved one
autor: you will learn to live with it. You will heal and you will rebuild yourself around the loss you have suffered. You will be whole again but you will never be the same. Nor should you be the same nor would you want to.
explicacao: Citação de you will learn to live with it. You will heal and you will rebuild yourself around the loss you have suffered. You will be whole again but you will never be the same. Nor should you be the same nor would you want to. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The reality is that you will grieve forever. You will not ‘get over’ the loss of a loved one” articula reflexao, elisabeth-kubler-ross, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
